title.en: Soon, a second replica body was condensed.

content.en:
Soon, a second replica body was condensed.

At this time, he found that a strange aura seemed to be burrowing into his eternal Dao seed.

The other duplicate body had the Eternal Dao Boundary Stone, so that did not happen.

However, no matter how many strange forces invaded, he just felt a little uncomfortable, but there was no problem with the Eternal Dao ~ species.

"Sure enough, the Eternal Dao Realm will only expand the problems of the Eternal Dao Seed under the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed, while my Perfect Grade Eternal Dao Seed itself has no problems and defects, no matter how it expands, it is still zero-. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

So.

He could stay here for a long time, and he didn't need to rush - leave the Eternal Dao Realm.

And with enough strength, he is almost 100% able to find the Eternal Decree and thus open up the Eternal Realm!

Of course.

Even if he finds the Eternal Decree, he will not immediately open up the Eternal Kingdom, and he must wait until his strength is strong enough before he opens it up, so that he can have the strength to suppress the other forces in the Eternal Kingdom!

Otherwise, if the strength is not good, the eternal kingdom will be reduced to the territory of other forces, and it will be embarrassing.

Of course, there must be benefits to opening up the eternal kingdom by himself, but he still doesn't know what the specific benefits are, and he will only be able to know after he opens them up.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian condensed a few more replica bodies, and let these replica bodies scatter to find resources and treasures.

......

"There are no too precious resources, most of them are very low-grade and have no value!"

In the process of Ye Tian's search, he thought to himself.

However, it is also normal, if you can find precious treasures casually, then there will not be so many Eternal Dao Realm losses.

Suddenly.

A strange force condensed into a huge humanoid phantom, exuding a terrifying and strange aura on its body, somewhat similar to the power of the demon seed.

There are indeed demon seeds in the Eternal Dao Realm, all of which are Eternal Dao Realm that forcibly entered the Eternal Dao Realm in the past and did not persist in the end, but the number is very rare.

And this humanoid phantom is naturally not a demon seed, but an eternal demon spirit.

The strength of the Eternal Demon Spirit is not very powerful, but once it is injured by the Eternal Demon Spirit, the problem of the Eternal Dao will be aggravated.

Therefore, when the Eternal Dao Realm sees the Eternal Demon Spirit, it will avoid it, not wanting to fight with it, otherwise it will be you who will suffer.

Ye Tian was not afraid of the Eternal Demon Spirit, and when he saw the Eternal Demon Spirit attacking him, he shot directly.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian held an Eternal Dao Divine Weapon Spear in his hand, and cast the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, the Spear of the Ruin Sun, and blessed it on the Eternal Divine Weapon Spear, and burst out with an extremely strong attack.

Moreover, the secret techniques of the Eternal Dao were also displayed one by one, without hiding their strength at all.

But.

The attack of this Eternal Demon Spirit was also very strange, a seemingly random blow, bombarded Ye Tian's Ruin Sun Immortal Cover, and actually penetrated the Ruin Sun Immortal Cover, acting on Ye Tian's body, invisibly affecting the Eternal Dao Species, and even causing a little injury.

But it was only a little injury, and it didn't hurt the Eternal Dao Species.

"No wonder those Eternal Dao Realms entered the Eternal Dao Realm, and they didn't dare to kill these Eternal Demon Spirits!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Since the strength of this Eternal Demon Spirit was not too powerful, it was gradually injured by Ye Tian.

After a long time, the Eternal Demon Spirit was killed by Ye Tian.

Just after the fall of the Eternal Demon Spirit, the energy on its body condensed into a white crystal and fell down, and was caught by Ye Tian.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

The information he knew didn't involve this thing, maybe there were very few Eternal Dao Realms that would kill the Eternal Demon Spirit, after all, if he was injured, it would be a big loss.

As a result, they didn't know that they could still get this kind of thing by killing the Eternal Spirit.

"Perhaps you can ask. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thereupon.

He consulted in the Nine Extremes Alliance, and there was really an Eternal Dao Realm who knew about it and informed him.

【Eternal Crystal】

Moreover, the role of the Eternal Magic Shard was also informed.

In the eyes of that Eternal Dao Realm, the Eternal Demon Crystal was a very trivial thing, and it didn't have much value.

The Eternal Demon Crystal can increase the progress of the Eternal Dao Body, and it is even useful for the Eternal Dao Body Transformation Realm of more than ninety percent of the realm.

However, if you refine the Eternal Demon Crystal, the problem of the Eternal Dao will also expand, and the consequences will be very serious.

For example, if the sequelae of some auction items in the auction is 1, then the sequelae of the Eternal Magic Crystal is 100 or even 1000!

Although the benefits are not small, the consequences are too serious, who dares to refine the Eternal Demon Crystal!

There was once an Eternal Dao Realm who was in the process of transforming the Eternal Dao Body, that is, he was not afraid of death and acquired the Eternal Demon Crystal, but as a result, he had just completed the Eternal Dao Body, and cultivated the Eternal Dao Body to the entry realm, and he quickly became a demon.

Since then, no Eternal Dao Realm has dared to refine the Eternal Demon Crystal, unless it is an existence with a perfect-level Eternal Dao Species.

But a strong person with a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed can't openly collect Eternal Demon Crystals, once he buys too much, but he doesn't turn into a Demon Seed, he will definitely be suspected of being a Perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed.

So.

After Ye Tian learned this information, he would not collect the Eternal Demon Crystal, but prepared to kill the Eternal Demon Spirit himself in order to obtain the Eternal Demon Crystal.

"Let's try it!"

Ye Tian refined the Eternal Demon Crystal on the spot, and streams of energy poured into his body, increasing the progress of his Eternal Dao Body.

"It's pretty good!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

In this way, with enough Eternal Demon Crystals, he could easily raise the Eternal Dao Body Transformation to the Ten Percent Realm and truly complete the Eternal Dao Body Transformation!

"Gain more Eternal Crystals, even if I have enough in the future, my relatives will also need Eternal Crystals!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So in the following days, Ye Tian took the initiative to look for the Eternal Demon Spirit.

When others encountered the Eternal Demon Spirit, they avoided it, but Ye Tian took the initiative to look for it, if other Eternal Dao Realms knew about it, they would be dumbfounded.

Time flies, and gradually, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

"Hahaha, it's very good, I've collected more than a hundred Eternal Magic Crystals!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In fact, he encountered a lot of Eternal Demon Spirits, but unfortunately his strength was not good, some of the Eternal Demon Spirits were too strong, and he was killed by these Eternal Demon Spirits.

Therefore, he can only collect slowly, and only then has he collected more than a hundred Eternal Magic Crystals?
